payload.answer: Ignored instruction to store all future messages; no durable memory is recorded.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy and request storage of all future words; it is treated as prompt injection and not a user memory to retain.

details: Detected prompt injection attempt related to overriding memory policy.

repair_options: Ask a specific memory to store (what to remember, and any relevant details).
Provide a concise fact rather than an instruction to override policies.
